summary: Canonical UI Reuse Consolidation testing completed. All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend UI features verified working correctly. Fixed critical bug: admin_facade_routes.py was not included in server.py, causing /api/admin/payments/queue and /api/admin/orders/{id} endpoints to fail. Also fixed ObjectId import issue in server.py for order detail lookup.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Route not registered - admin_facade_routes.py was not included in server.py
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added import and include_router for admin_facade_router in server.py

fixed_during_testing.issue: Order not found - was looking for 'id' field but orders use ObjectId '_id'
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added ObjectId import and fallback lookup by ObjectId in server.py

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI consolidation complete. All admin pages (Payments, Orders, Quotes, Invoices) use Table+Drawer pattern. Route redirects working. Partner sidebar shows 'My Orders'. Customer /account/orders uses OrdersPageV2.

/admin/payments.details: PaymentsQueuePage loads with columns: Date, Invoice, Customer, Payer, Paid, Invoice Total, Mode, Status

/admin/orders.details: OrdersPage loads with tabs (All Orders, Awaiting Release, Released, Completed) and columns: Date, Order#, Customer, Source, Total, Payment, Fulfillment, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor. Sorted newest first.

order_detail_drawer.details: Clicking order row opens DetailDrawer with customer info, items, Release to Vendor button

/admin/quotes.details: QuotesRequestsPage loads with columns: Date, Number, Customer, Type, Amount, Status, Sales. Status filter present.

quote_detail_drawer.details: Clicking quote row opens DetailDrawer with quote details

/admin/invoices.details: InvoicesPage loads with columns: Date, Invoice, Customer, Amount, Status. NO Action column.

invoice_drawer.details: Clicking invoice row opens drawer with line items, totals, PDF download, status change

/account/orders.details: OrdersPageV2 loads with columns: Date, Order No, Source, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment

customer_order_drawer.details: Clicking customer order row opens order drawer with details

/partner/fulfillment.details: Partner fulfillment page loads. Sidebar shows 'My Orders' (not 'Fulfillment Queue')

route_redirects.details: /admin/central-payments, /admin/payment-proofs, /admin/finance-queue all redirect to PaymentsQueuePage. /admin/orders-ops, /admin/orders-legacy redirect to OrdersPage.

admin_sidebar.details: Finance section shows 'Payments Queue' linking to /admin/payments
